overdueSimulation.subtitle: What happens if your installment is late?

debtRolling.title: Debt Rolling Simulator
debtRolling.subtitle: Calculate debt transfer cost
debtRolling.infoText: This simulator calculates the cost of transferring debt from one card to another via cash advance based on TCMB 2026 rates.

debtRollingInfo.description: The debt rolling simulator calculates the total cost of transferring debt from one credit card to another via cash advance based on TCMB 2026 rates.
debtRollingInfo.formula2: KKDF and BSMV are calculated on the cash advance interest. Total tax = Interest × (15% + 15%)
debtRollingInfo.formula3: Total cost = Cash advance interest + KKDF + BSMV + Transaction fee. Monthly payment = (Amount + Total cost) ÷ Term
debtRollingInfo.risk1: Low risk: Target card utilization below 50%
debtRollingInfo.risk2: Medium risk: Utilization between 50%-80% or 1 warning
debtRollingInfo.risk3: High risk: Utilization above 80% or 2+ warnings. May seriously affect your Findeks score.
debtRollingInfo.disclaimer: This calculation is for informational purposes only. Your bank may apply different rates. Cash advance transactions do not benefit from interest-free periods.

installmentCalc.title: Installment Calculator
installmentCalc.subtitle: BDDK 2026 installment limits
installmentCalc.infoSource: This calculator works based on the 2026 installment limits set by BDDK (Banking Regulation and Supervision Agency of Turkey).
installmentCalc.infoRule1: Installments are prohibited for groceries, fuel, telecom, and international purchases.
installmentCalc.infoRule2: New phones: For purchases over 12,000 TL — personal max 3, commercial max 6 installments.
installmentCalc.infoRule3: Televisions: For purchases over 5,000 TL — personal max 4, commercial max 8 installments.
installmentCalc.infoRule4: Refurbished phones: No amount limit — personal 12, commercial 18 installments.
installmentCalc.infoRule5: Healthcare, education, computers: Personal max 12, commercial max 18 installments.
installmentCalc.infoCardType1: Personal card: Standard BDDK installment limits apply.
installmentCalc.infoCardType2: Commercial card: Installment limits are approximately 2x personal cards (max 18 months).
installmentCalc.infoDisclaimer: This information is based on current BDDK regulations. Banks may apply lower limits based on their own policies.

loanSimInfo.description: The loan simulator calculates using the standard annuity (equal installment) payment method used in the banking industry.
loanSimInfo.formula1: Monthly payment = Principal × [r × (1+r)^n] / [(1+r)^n - 1], where r = monthly rate, n = number of months.
loanSimInfo.formula2: Effective interest rate: KKDF (15%) and BSMV (15%) taxes are added to the bank's nominal rate. Effective rate = Nominal rate × (1 + KKDF + BSMV).
loanSimInfo.formula3: Total payment = Monthly payment × Term. Total interest cost = Total payment - Principal.
loanSimInfo.overdue1: Overdue interest is calculated daily at 30% above the monthly interest rate.
loanSimInfo.overdue2: As the overdue period increases, total cost grows exponentially. 30+ days overdue seriously affects your credit score.
loanSimInfo.disclaimer: This calculation is for informational purposes only. Actual loan terms may differ based on your bank's conditions.

restructuring.title: Restructuring Simulator
restructuring.subtitle: BDDK 60-month restructuring
restructuring.tierLow: Debt below 30,000 TL: Lowest interest tier
restructuring.tierHigh: Debt above 180,000 TL: Highest interest tier
restructuring.criticalWarningText: During restructuring, your card limit will not be increased until your debt drops below 50% of your total limit.
